market_summary: Risk tone appears weaker versus earlier in the day, with broad-market headlines pointing to a risk-off backdrop and elevated volatility. Micron (MU) has meaningful fresh catalyst flow (post-earnings/AI-memory narrative), and UNH remains headline-sensitive around medical-cost/Medicare pressure themes. I could not read the local morning cache/staging files in this run due a sandbox execution failure, so symbol-by-symbol morning deltas are flagged with lower confidence except where live web checks showed clear new signals.
